message:
feat(widgets): Add budget-aware degradation to all widgets (bd-128s)

Widgets now respect DegradationLevel for graceful performance degradation:

- Block: ASCII borders at SimpleBorders, skip at EssentialOnly, clear at Skeleton
- Paragraph: Skip content at Skeleton, no styling at NoStyling
- TextInput: Essential (always renders), skip styling at NoStyling
- ProgressBar: Text-only at EssentialOnly, skip at Skeleton
- Spinner: ASCII fallback at SimpleBorders, label-only at EssentialOnly
- Scrollbar: Skip entirely at EssentialOnly (decorative)
- Rule: Skip at EssentialOnly, ASCII at SimpleBorders

Infrastructure changes:
- DegradationLevel convenience methods: use_unicode_borders(), apply_styling(),
  render_decorative(), render_content()
- Buffer.degradation field for widgets to read during render
- Frame.set_degradation() syncs to buffer
- Widget trait: is_essential() method

Includes comprehensive degradation tests for all affected widgets.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
